mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET post_count = post_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET follower_count = follower_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET following_count = following_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET follower_count = GREATEST(follower_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET following_count = GREATEST(following_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET post_count = GREATEST(post_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET like_count = like_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET like_count = GREATEST(like_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET collection_count = collection_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET collection_count = GREATEST(collection_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET history_count = history_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET history_count = GREATEST(history_count - 1, 0), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET history_count = #{count}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE users SET last_login_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_follows (follower_id, following_id) VALUES (#{followerId}, #{followingId})
mapper.select: SELECT u.* FROM users u INNER JOIN user_follows uf ON u.id = uf.follower_id WHERE uf.following_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC
SELECT u.* FROM users u INNER JOIN user_follows uf ON u.id = uf.following_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id as user_id, u.nickname as nickname, u.avatar_url as avatar_url, uf.created_at as followed_at, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf2 WHERE uf2.follower_id = #{userId} AND uf2.following_id = u.id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as followed_back FROM users u INNER JOIN user_follows uf ON u.id = uf.follower_id WHERE uf.following_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, COALESCE(u.follower_count, 0) AS follower_count, COALESCE(u.following_count, 0) AS following_count, COALESCE(u.post_count, 0) AS post_count, COALESCE(u.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(u.collection_count, 0) AS collection_count, COALESCE(u.history_count, 0) AS history_count, u.following_visibility, u.follower_visibility, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf2 WHERE uf2.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf2.following_id = u.id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_following, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf2 WHERE uf2.follower_id = u.id AND uf2.following_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_followed FROM users u INNER JOIN user_follows uf ON u.id = uf.follower_id WHERE uf.following_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, COALESCE(u.follower_count, 0) AS follower_count, COALESCE(u.following_count, 0) AS following_count, COALESCE(u.post_count, 0) AS post_count, COALESCE(u.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(u.collection_count, 0) AS collection_count, COALESCE(u.history_count, 0) AS history_count, u.following_visibility, u.follower_visibility, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf2 WHERE uf2.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf2.following_id = u.id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_following, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf2 WHERE uf2.follower_id = u.id AND uf2.following_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_followed FROM users u INNER JOIN user_follows uf ON u.id = uf.following_id WHERE uf.follower_id = #{userId} ORDER BY uf.created_at DESC

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, COALESCE(u.follower_count, 0) AS follower_count, COALESCE(u.following_count, 0) AS following_count, COALESCE(u.post_count, 0) AS post_count, COALESCE(u.like_count, 0) AS like_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorites pf INNER JOIN posts p ON pf.post_id = p.id WHERE pf.user_id = u.id AND p.status = 1 AND p.visibility = 1) AS collection_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_browsing_history ubh INNER JOIN posts p ON ubh.post_id = p.id WHERE ubh.user_id = u.id AND p.status = 1 AND p.visibility = 1) AS history_count, u.following_visibility, u.follower_visibility, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(favorite_count), 0) FROM posts WHERE user_id = u.id) AS received_favorite_count, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf WHERE uf.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf.following_id = u.id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_following, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf WHERE uf.follower_id = u.id AND uf.following_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_followed FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{userId}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.bio, u.gender, COALESCE(u.follower_count, 0) AS follower_count, COALESCE(u.following_count, 0) AS following_count, COALESCE(u.post_count, 0) AS post_count, COALESCE(u.like_count, 0) AS like_count, COALESCE(u.collection_count, 0) AS collection_count, COALESCE(u.history_count, 0) AS history_count, u.following_visibility, u.follower_visibility, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf WHERE uf.follower_id = #{currentUserId} AND uf.following_id = u.id ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_following, CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_follows uf WHERE uf.follower_id = u.id AND uf.following_id = #{currentUserId} ) THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END as is_followed FROM users u WHERE u.nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY u.follower_count DESC, u.id ASC
